__comment__: This file was automatically created by mcresources
name: Flask Recipes

pages.text: There are three tiers of water flasks.$(br)The leather flask holds 5 drinks and lasts for 100 uses.$(br)The iron flask holds 20 drinks, and lasts for 400 uses.$(br)The red steel flask holds 20 drinks, and lasts for ever.$(br)Both leather and iron flasks may be repaired.

pages.title: 修復配方
pages.text: 水壺在全損後也能進行修復
